Article: 19th 32nd angels
[]: 19th-32nd angels?             Quote Post by Baraqijal » Fri Mar 09, 2007 12:01 am Something that's been bugging me for a while, if Kaworu, the 17th angel and Rei, the 18th angel (its my assumption that if Rei had appeared on her own like Kaworu did, she would be identified solely as the 18th angel, instead of all of the humanity) have the souls of Adam, the 1st angel and Lilith, the 2nd angel, could it be possible to take the souls of Sachiel through Armisael and make albino angel clones out of them? Or is it only possible through Adam and Lilith because they can bear life?
